title: Sander de Lange
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Person
|image=[[File:Sander_De_Lange_profile.jpg]]

'''Sander de Lange''' from the Netherlands wrote the backstory of [[Niai Fieso]] appearing in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]], through the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature of [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]]. His alias is ''exarxan'' on [[StarWars.com]], and he was known as {{U|Exar Xan}} on [[Wookieepedia]].

He is a contributing editor of TeeKay-421, the Belgian ''Star Wars'' fan club. At [[Celebration Europe II]] he organized the ''Star Wars'' Trivia Challenge on Sunday as part of TeeKay-421.

Together with [[Tim Veekhoven]] and [[Kevin Beentjes]], Sander did research for the [[Rogues Gallery (Star Wars Insider)|Rogues Gallery]] feature in ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'', starting with [[Star Wars Insider 145|issue 145]].

{{Author-stub}}

===''[[Star Wars in 100 Scenes]]''===
Together with [[Jason Fry]], Sander established that the [[N-1 starfighter/Legends|N-1 starfighter]] that [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] flew during the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]] previously belonged to [[Essara Till/Legends|Essara Till]].
